auth.signupDescription: Create your account to get started.
auth.name: Name
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to reset your password.
auth.accountNotFound: No account found with this email. Please sign up.
auth.authErrorDescription: Something went wrong during sign in. Please try again.
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.createAccountFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
auth.accountCreatedLoginFailed: Account created but login failed. Please try logging in.
auth.checkEmailDescription: If an account exists, we've sent password reset instructions.
auth.resetLinkFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
auth.invalidResetLinkDescription: This password reset link is missing required information.
auth.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

Configuration.title: Setup issue
Configuration.description: Sign-in isn't configured correctly on our side. Please try again later or contact support.

AccessDenied.title: Access denied
AccessDenied.description: You don't have permission to sign in this way. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.

Verification.title: Link expired
Verification.description: This sign-in link is no longer valid. Request a new one and try again.

OAuthSignin.title: Couldn't connect to Google
OAuthSignin.description: We couldn't start Google sign-in. Check your connection and try again.

OAuthCallback.title: Google sign-in failed
OAuthCallback.description: Something went wrong while finishing Google sign-in. Please try again.

OAuthCreateAccount.title: Couldn't create your account
OAuthCreateAccount.description: We couldn't finish creating your account with Google. Please try again.

EmailCreateAccount.title: Couldn't create your account
EmailCreateAccount.description: We couldn't create an account with this email. It may already be registered.

Callback.title: Sign-in interrupted
Callback.description: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again in a moment.

OAuthAccountNotLinked.title: Use your original sign-in method
OAuthAccountNotLinked.description: This email is already registered with email and password. Log in that way, or reset your password if needed.

EmailSignin.title: Email sign-in failed
EmailSignin.description: We couldn't complete email sign-in. Request a new link and try again.

CredentialsSignin.title: Invalid email or password
CredentialsSignin.description: The credentials you entered don't match an account. Check your details or create a new account.

SessionRequired.title: Sign in required
SessionRequired.description: You need to be signed in to open that page.

Default.title: Something went wrong
Default.description: We couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again or use a different method.

landing.heroDescription: {appName} helps you publish a beautiful storefront, manage inventory, and accept orders — including WhatsApp checkout — without building a full e-commerce site.
landing.navStorefrontsDesc: Shareable catalog pages with your branding.
landing.navInventoryDesc: Track stock and show what's left at checkout.
landing.navOptionsDesc: Sizes, variations, and modifiers with images.
landing.navWhatsappDesc: Route orders to WhatsApp or manage in-app.
landing.ctaDescription: Join {appName} and give customers a polished way to browse and order your products today.
landing.galleryDescription: Totes, mugs, sneakers, candles, and more — showcase everyday products with clean photos and layouts that sell.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to sell from a link
landing.featuresDescription: From product setup to checkout, {appName} keeps the workflow simple for small teams and solo sellers.
landing.featureStorefrontsDesc: Publish a catalog at a clean URL. Customers browse products without creating an account.
landing.featureLayoutsDesc: Switch between catalog styles, feature hero products, and customize your store profile.
landing.featureOptionsDesc: Let customers pick options with images, price adjustments, and clear selection rules.
landing.featureInventoryDesc: Track stock per product, show what's left in the cart, and prevent overselling at checkout.
landing.featureWhatsappDesc: Send orders straight to WhatsApp or manage them in your dashboard — your choice.
landing.featureInsightsDesc: Review orders, update status, and monitor revenue trends from one place.
landing.highlightsTitle: Built for sellers who move fast
landing.highlightsDescription: Skip the heavy e-commerce stack. Publish a catalog, manage orders, and keep inventory aligned — all from one dashboard.
landing.highlightMobileDesc: Designed for shoppers on phones — fast browsing, easy checkout.
landing.highlightWhatsappDesc: Meet customers where they already chat and buy.
landing.highlightBrandDesc: Polished storefronts without custom front-end work.
landing.highlightLaunchDesc: Go from signup to live catalog link in under an hour.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up, add your store name, logo, and catalog settings in minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Upload images, set prices, track inventory, and configure sizes or add-ons.
landing.step3Desc: Send your catalog link. Customers order via checkout or WhatsApp — you manage it all.
landing.pricingTitle: Simple plans that grow with you
landing.pricingDescription: Start free, then upgrade when you need more stores, products, or premium storefront layouts.
landing.orXafPerMonth: or {amount} XAF / mo via mobile money
landing.pricingFootnote: All paid plans renew monthly. NotchPay plans extend for 30 days after each successful mobile money payment.
landing.footerDescription: Create beautiful product catalogs, manage inventory, and accept orders — including WhatsApp checkout — without building a full store from scratch.

faqItems.question: Do customers need an account to order?
faqItems.answer: No. Shoppers browse your public catalog and check out with their name and phone number.

faqItems.question: Can I use WhatsApp for orders?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Enable WhatsApp mode in store settings and orders open in WhatsApp while still saving to your dashboard.

faqItems.question: How does inventory work?
faqItems.answer: Turn on stock tracking per product. The storefront, cart, and checkout respect available quantity.

faqItems.question: Can I customize my catalog layout?
faqItems.answer: Choose catalog layouts and feature products in the hero. Premium tiers unlock more storefront options.

testimonials.name: Amara Osei
testimonials.quote: We replaced our PDF catalog in a weekend. Customers order faster and we finally track stock properly.

testimonials.name: James Chen
testimonials.quote: WhatsApp checkout is a game changer for our market. Orders land organized in the dashboard.

testimonials.name: Sofia Martinez
testimonials.quote: Modifiers with images made our menu crystal clear. Setup was simple and the storefront looks premium.

testimonials.name: David Okon
testimonials.quote: Inventory limits stopped overselling during busy weeks. The team loves the clean admin experience.

testimonials.name: Lena Park
testimonials.quote: Beautiful layouts without hiring a developer. Our catalog link is now on every social bio.

metadata.description: Create and share beautiful product catalogs for your store
